seoTitle: Uley vs Uleybury — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Uley and Uleybury. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Uley and Uleybury.
heading: Uley vs Uleybury — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Uley, South Australia and Uleybury, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Uleybury has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Uley (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Uley or Uleybury safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Uley has a flood risk score of 31/100, while Uleybury scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Uley scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Uleybury scores 61/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Uley or Uleybury?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Uleybury has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
